semantics.title: Digital Payment Verification Standard
semantics.summary: Defines deterministic, machine-verifiable requirements for the authenticity, completeness, and re-computability of digital payment records, from authorization through settlement and finality.
semantics.scope_note: Determines whether a digital payment record is authentic, complete, internally consistent, and re-computable at a specified verification time. It does not certify KYC, AML, sanctions, tax compliance, source-of-funds lawfulness, or dispute liability.

notes.intent: Derived machine representation. The frozen PDF remains the sole Normative Artifact.
